title: Cobblemon Rivals
description: Modpack for the popular Minecraft server Cobblemon Rivals
body:
![Rivals](https://i.imgur.com/F5tW3yu.png) This Pokémon Minecraft server offers the highest quality and most extensive Cobblemon experience out there! Join the public server and dive into Minecraft survival with your very own Pokémon! Catch Pokémon, battle gyms, fight bosses, and so much more! **Check out the Discord and IP below!**
| **Server Version:** | 1.7.1 | | :---: | :---: | | **Minecraft Version:** | 1.21.1 | | **Server Ip:** | play.cobblemonrivals.com |
[![Cobblemon Rivals Discord](https://i.imgur.com/7l2ScoE.png)](https://discord.gg/dUHHf76vwk) [![Cobblemon Rivals Store](https://i.imgur.com/FxzPvIZ.png)](https://store.cobblemonrivals.com) [![Cobblemon Wiki](https://i.imgur.com/kQcGbrm.png)](https://wiki.cobblemon.com/index.php/Main_Page)


## Mega Evolutions, Dynamax & Terastallization, Z-Moves, Rideable Pokémon, Pokémon with different sizes


## Player & NPC Gyms, Ranked Battles & Tournaments, Raid Bosses & Wild Bosses, Legendary Pokémon, Quests & Hunts


## Active & Friendly Community, GTS & Wondertrade, Markets & Server Shop, Land Claiming, Mailbox


## Keep Inventory, Breeding & Daycare, TMs & Move Tutors, Resource World, Fossils



Cobblemon Rivals is a Cobblemon-themed Minecraft survival server that fosters a welcoming and fun multiplayer experience. **Join us for the adventure!**
[![Cobblemon Rivals Discord](https://i.imgur.com/7l2ScoE.png)](https://discord.gg/dUHHf76vwk) [![Cobblemon Rivals Store](https://i.imgur.com/FxzPvIZ.png)](https://store.cobblemonrivals.com)
